comment.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.facebook.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2F) ### Comment > My FB is being overwhelmed by ads and it has been for weeks. I've been reporting it, but all I get back is that they can't reproduce it. Here are several examples. I'm not making this up. I don't know why they can't reproduce it, but I'm a paying customer and I'm tired of what I'm paying for not working. Please fix this. ``` Username: @JackLGM ``` ### Screenshots
